title: oreanthes fragilis
intro: Oreanthes fragilis, commonly known as the Himalayan orchid, is a rare and endangered plant species native to the Eastern Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its potential health benefits. The therapeutic actions of Oreanthes fragilis include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties and potential therapeutic effects.
intro_study: According to the study on "Osmanthus fragrans" (which is the scientific name for Oreenthes fragilis), Oreenthes fragilis benefits include antioxidant, anticancer, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial activities, which can be used to treat various human diseases.
parts: Oreanthes fragilis has many medicinal parts, such as leaves, roots, and flowers, which are utilized to treat various health conditions. The leaves of Oreanthes fragilis are rich in flavonoids, particularly quercetin and kaempferol, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The roots of this plant contain saponins and glycosides, including oreanthalactone and oreanthoside, which have been traditionally used to treat fever and digestive issues. The flowers of Oreanthes fragilis are also rich in essential oils, including limonene and beta-pinene, which have been reported to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
side_effects: Oreanthes fragilis can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation and allergic reactions due to its high concentration of saponins. Ingesting large amounts of the plant can cause gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Long-term exposure to the plant's toxic compounds has also been linked to kidney damage and liver problems. Improper use of Oreanthes fragilis can also lead to respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma-like symptoms, in people with pre-existing conditions.
